caption: The video features a person from Jaspys Casebreaks, who is likely discussing or demonstrating the use of RANDOM.ORG for various randomization purposes. Initially, the screen shows the "Dice Roller" feature on the RANDOM.ORG website, where two dice have been rolled, displaying the numbers five and one. The timestamp indicates this occurred on June 27, 2020, at 02:59:08 UTC. Subsequently, the video transitions to the "List Randomizer" section of the website, where a list of Major League Baseball teams is entered into the form. The person appears to be preparing to randomize this list, possibly for a draw or selection process related to sports cards or collectibles, which aligns with the theme of Jaspys Casebreaks. Throughout the video, the individual encourages viewers to subscribe to their channel, as indicated by the prominent "Subscribe" button on the screen.
